repos.description: Autonomous GPU kernel optimization system driven by AI agents.
大龙虾博客上线了，企业微信+llm+多agent，通过语音管理你的博客和编码发布,使用go语言实现。简单轻量易用。

Local-first codebase retrieval for AI coding agents — zero-token context packets before grep. 60% first-correct-file@5 on SWE-bench Lite (10x naive grep), session learning, edit-impact hooks, auditable receipts.
Autonomous coding agent using free LLM Providers
Self-hosted personal finance agent for households. Ask natural-language questions about your spending, accounts, and subscriptions. Runs fully local on Ollama — no data leaves your machine.
Intelligence without consciousness. Process without self. Scale without limit.
Ultra-frugal LLM shell for VS Code. No agentic loop. One request, one response.
Workflow continuity for AI coding agents. Start work, commit phases, resume anywhere.
The open-source agent brewery. Describe what you need — agents that reason, act, and coordinate via ReAct + MCP. Self-hosted, any LLM, one Docker command. BSL 1.1.
A desktop app for building, running, and supervising small teams of AI agents. MCP-native tools, shared workspaces, and scheduled automations.
Full Rust SDK for the Gemini Multimodal Live API — wire protocol, agent runtime, and fluent DX in three layered crates.
Skillscript — a small declarative language for authoring agent workflows. Runtime, compiler, and CLI.
Claude Code TUI dashboard: live monitor for parallel sessions and sub-agents, with LLM-generated daily/weekly digest
Governance proxy for AI agents — per-agent budgets, cost tracking, loop detection, and   policy enforcement. Agents never hold real API keys.

Opencode-mcp es una extension para vscode/antigravity que integra un panel de chat conectado a tu servidor local de Opencode, permitiendo usar tus agents, skills, tools y mcp directamente desde el editor.
High-performance Go tools for LLM Agents (MCP/CLI). 100x faster than Python. Includes native MCP Server, token-optimized search, and persistent project memory.

Govern your documents like code. MCP server that indexes .md/.docx/.html/.pdf into a SQLite knowledge graph and runs drift audits — stale policies, conflicting research claims, superseded docs, undocumented code exports. 12 MCP tools incl. cross-reference graph, governance + provenance metadata, topic similarity. Single binary, zero runtime deps.

Local agent swarm: a conductor model splits missions into parallel sub-agents with real tools and a localhost web UI. Runs locally out of the box; Docker/E2B/Modal/Vercel sandboxes optional. Works with DeepSeek, OpenAI, Anthropic, Grok, MiniMax, OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio, etc.

Eval framework that ranks agentic coding frameworks (Superpowers, Compound Engineering, Agent Skills, GSD) by having each build the same spec with the same harness+model in isolated sandboxes, graded on a weighted evidence-based rubric: PRD adherence, code quality, speed, token spend
Just as a prism separates light into distinct colors, this delegation layer separates complex workflows into focused, single-purpose local agents.

Agentic AI Coding Platform that enables everyone to train, design and embed custom LLMs into a custom agent. Deploy your agent into the builderforce (a workforce and hiring platform). Explore skills, personnas, content, governance and workforce agents in the marketplace.

Evolving agent harnesses: a research program on how far N orchestrated calls of a small model can rival a frontier model. We evolve the harness (structure + prompts) with reflective optimizers + a verified-acceptance gate.
M4STCLAW v5 + OpenWork + EIGENT — Unified Autonomous Agent Infrastructure.

Umbrella monorepo for Bodhi AI — a local-first desktop AI agent. Submodule pointers + a release train tie together Bamboo (Rust runtime), Lotus (React UI), Bodhi (Tauri shell), Bodhi Server (Go backend), Pavilion (website/docs) and Nova (macOS Computer-Use MCP).
Automate TikTok video creation with six AI agents for trend research, scripts, voiceovers, B-roll, rendering, and QA
Apply realistic sensor noise, analog artifacts, and camera metadata to AI-generated images using this custom ComfyUI node suite for research and photorealism.
An autonomous Python agent that scans the web daily for the latest LLM, AI tools, and agentic AI content, then sends a beautifully formatted email digest to your Gmail.
A self-hosted cognitive operating system. AI agents as kernel processes. One Rust binary, no runtime dependencies, multi-tenant.
Agent memory system with retain-recall-reflect loop. Hybrid search, entity resolution, observation synthesis. TypeScript library + MCP server.

🥒 Pickle — MCP server + skills for managers. Audits team performance across ClickUp, Slack, and Microsoft Teams. Compares what your team said vs what tasks show. Works in any MCP host — Claude, Cursor, Codex, Cline. Runs on your machine.

GoodMemory 是一个面向 AI 应用的**可插拔用户记忆层**。  它不替代： - LLM - agent framework - 向量数据库 - RAG 系统  它专注解决一个更具体的问题：  > **如何让任何 chatbox / copilot / agent / workflow assistant 在不重训模型的前提下，真正“记住用户”。**  GoodMemory 的核心不是“存更多”，而是：  - 记什么 - 何时更新 - 如何检索 - 如何压缩 - 为什么引用 - 如何删除 - 如何控制跨 agent / 跨项目 / 跨租户边界  它的本质是一个：  > **Personal Context Engine / Memory Layer for AI Apps**
AI-Native WireGuard Overlay Networking & AI agent sandbox

The test suite your MCP server is missing. Tool, resource, agent-loop, schema-drift, compliance, and security tests against any Model Context Protocol server, in CI on every commit. One YAML suite, deterministic cassette replay, multi-model comparison, and LLM-judge evals. Rust, Apache-2.0.

Local desktop AI tutor: designs personalized courses on any topic with articles, interactive widgets, comprehension tests, homework review, and TTS lectures. Free — uses your Claude Pro/Max or ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription. Tauri + React + Claude Agent SDK / Codex SDK.
🧠 Build autonomous AI agents with Ollama and LangChain, featuring local LLM inference, memory handling, and voice interaction in Python.

Headless agentic runtime in Go, multi-provider LLM, sandboxed tools, MCP client, plan mode & permissions. Drop-in Anthropic API compatible.
Manage AI agent teams locally using CLI, OAuth, and API tools to simulate a virtual company with autonomous workflows.
Build and run local-first agents with customizable MCP tools, safe defaults, and replayable workflows for developers at any skill level.
Manage complex tasks by breaking goals into subtasks, routing them to specialized agents, and iterating with an LLM-driven real-time orchestrator.
Enable autonomous AI workflows with a local-first, zero-trust Rust framework for high-performance multi-agent orchestration and deterministic execution.
Verifiable cognition for AI agents — a tamper-evident, replayable ledger of what an agent did and why (korg-ledger spec).
A Go framework for chat-network agents: an IRC bouncer, browser UI, and bot orchestrator in one static binary, with an optional LLM hookup for AI features. Stewarded by xShellz.
Kubernetes operator for deploying and managing AI agents with WebSocket/gRPC facades, session management, and tool integration
Add consistent identity control to Flux.2 models using PuLID with improved face recognition and native Klein weights integration.
Organize AI agent context into four memory tiers for token-efficient, always-available layered memory and cleaner prompt control
Self-hosted platform for MCP Apps and agent automations — tools, interactive UIs, scheduled runs, multi-agent delegation.

This application is a full-stack document indexing and retrieval system that allows users to upload documents, index their content, and perform natural language queries against the indexed documents. It utilizes LlamaIndex, OpenAI embeddings, and a modern React frontend to provide an interactive exp

Production-ready intelligent knowledge management system built with LlamaIndex. Enables organizations to query, analyze, and extract insights from multiple data sources (documents, databases, APIs) through natural language using advanced RAG capabilities, multi-tenant architecture, and specialized q
Defense-in-depth security framework for RAG systems: poison detection, cryptographic integrity, differential privacy, PIR, forensics, and production integrations for LangChain/LlamaIndex

AI Agent with LangChain & LLM Integration  This project showcases an AI agent built in Python using popular frameworks like LangChain. It demonstrates how to use various LLMs such as Claude and GPT, integrate external tools for enhanced capabilities, and structure the agent’s output for seamless use in your applications.
An unofficial Nix Flake package for the BrowserOS AI-Powered Web Browser

Architecture documentation for the Firm AI Agent ecosystem — setup-vs-agent-firm + mcp-openclaw-extensions + Memory-os-ai
A modular, self-hosted RAG pipeline for building a private, searchable personal knowledge base from PDFs and structured documents.
SwiftMind — Personal AI knowledge assistant (RAG) with KBs + chat
Single-binary, MLflow-API-compatible experiment tracker with first-class LLM trace support. 143× faster cold start than MLflow.
AI-Trading Agent that processes trading data, detects price-action patterns, classifies market movements as bullish, bearish, etc and explains those findings in clear human language.
LLM agent able to do database queries and mutations
GSAM: AI tool to enhance the software development ideation and AI models, providers and features selection and test
Production RAG system for industrial maintenance docs — hybrid retrieval, cross-encoder reranking, async FastAPI

Autonomous coding agent — a sentence in, a validated app out. Resilience stack with operational gates, completeness CRITIC, runtime flow verification, surgical-mode stuck-loop recovery, and progressive tiers. Compatible with any OpenAI-compatible LLM.

Fully local AI assistant & coding agent. LM Studio + ChromaDB + Tauri desktop app. Second brain, autonomous bots, emotional drives. Zero cloud, zero telemetry.

Cloud-native, event-driven payment transaction intelligence agent. Ingests simulated payment events, detects anomalies via rules + LLM, and produces automated risk reports through Claude with autonomous tool calling.

An Agentic AI-powered code review system that analyzes pull requests, identifies issues, generates fixes, writes tests, executes validation workflows, and assists developers through an autonomous review pipeline.

Portable Autonomous AI Agent with GUI. Built on LangGraph & MCP. Safe by design: human-in-the-loop for all critical actions. Self-correcting, multi-tool coding assistant in a single .exe.

Agent4j is a pure-Java AI coding agent framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) with a rich, extensible tool system to create a programming assistant capable of autonomously understanding, writing, and debugging code. Inspired by AI coding agents such as Claude Code and Devin, it is built entirely on Java 17 .
AI agent configuration security auditor - find misconfigurations in Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI tools

An AI-native KMS and next-gen RAG prototype. Enforces strict tree-shaped index constraints and compiler-like diagnostics after every write, enabling agents to self-heal knowledge structures and eliminate garbage-in, garbage-out RAG pain points.

Project Mantis is an autonomous DFIR framework for the SIFT Workstation. It orchestrates Volatility 3 and FLS using an LLM-Agnostic multi-agent FSM. By enforcing a deterministic Sieve and a strict "Hard Grounding" citation layer, Mantis minimizes LLM hallucinations to produce fully traceable, self-correcting MITRE ATT&CK incident reports.

Autonomous Tech News Research & Distribution Agent built with n8n. Aggregates news from Hacker News, TechCrunch, and The Verge, enriches articles using Tavily AI search, identifies the most important technology stories with LLMs, and automatically delivers curated news digests to Gmail and Discord.
Transformative Evolving Neural Kinetic Agent - a local-first Python voice agent for Windows.

Fractal — Fractal is the Organic Operating System that lives in your terminal, desktop, and messaging apps. It accumulates persistent memory, orchestrates autonomous agents, and executes real tasks across your workspace — all through natural language.
🧠 Build an offline RAG chatbot to answer questions from PDFs, adapting responses based on user experience levels with a smooth chat interface.

Autonomous AI agent platform that browses, interacts, and completes tasks on the web without hand-holding — built with a multi-agent simulation engine, Gemini LLM integration, and a Playwright-based execution layer.

A blazing-fast, local-first AI agent ecosystem. Orchestrate local LLMs with Python, run them in a native Rust terminal, or integrate directly into your editor via ACP.

A CLI for AI agents to operate Jira Data Center — issues, sprints, boards, epics, projects, and JQL search. Structured output and composable commands, built for LLM tool use.

An institutional-grade, neuro-symbolic multi-agent AI framework designed for autonomous credit risk control, financial modeling, and deterministic workflow orchestration.

Modular AI agent framework with 59 pluggable features, 8+ messaging channels, and production-grade security. TypeScript-first. MIT license. Self-hosted, no subscriptions.

AI-native 3D game engine for the browser. MCP commands let LLMs and agents build complete games - scenes, physics, audio, particles, scripts, and export  via natural language. Powered by WebGPU, Rust/WASM, and Bevy.
